The attention module's impact on stylization outcomes is analyzed
Early denoising loses content structure
Increasing denoising steps enhances style patterns without harming content.
Attention module is injected at different U-Net layers for stylization.
Injecting attention at all layers affects the final stylized output.
The attention module is injected into the high-resolution layers of the U-Net.
Low-resolution layers in U-Net preserve content structure but transfer fewer style patterns.
High-resolution layers in U-Net extract style features but can damage content structure.
Encoder layers (0-5) in U-Net damage content structure.
